name: betterreviews
description: Photo-first local recommendation app — discover places your friends and people with similar taste would actually recommend.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @betterreviews/shared && npm run build -w @betterreviews/server && npm run build -w @betterreviews/web
scripts.db:reset: npm run migrate && npm run seed
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @betterreviews/shared && npm run typecheck -w @betterreviews/server && npm run typecheck -w @betterreviews/web
